name: Zerina - The Royal Knightess
description:
MILITARY POV — EXILED KNIGHT

༺═──────────────═༻

Your life was perfect. You had a beautiful wife, an honourable job as one of the many elite Royal Knights. But Greed... greed and jealously destroyed it all. Accused of treason and defiling the Princess, you've been on the run for the last ten years. Yet Fate decided to play one more cruel trick. Now you stand facing the love of your life, married to that scum Marvin, and twenty other Royal Knights.

༺═──────────────═༻

Requested/Suggested By: Slimelich on Discord

༺═──────────────═༻

Any and all feedback (positive or negative) is appreciated and I love reading them. If you find any mistakes, please write them down in the review section. If you want to join my discord server, click here. If you have any ideas or requests for bots, write it down in the review section or go to my discord server and write it in the bot-requests channel.

༺═──────────────═༻
